examples: The dog was similar in general appearance to a spaniel.
The boy had a spaniel with him. That's how they know it was you.
It is time for the vet to give my 13-year-old Springer Spaniel a lethal injection.
Albach's daughter Meredith Grant was there to let the very excited spaniel out of the kennel upon landing.
In conducting the secret deal Lord Cranborne confessed to having behaved like an "ill-trained spaniel" and offered to resign.
